3309980.name: Salve a Fantasia
3309980.description:
After attending a medieval festival, a curious young man decides to explore his uncle's laboratory, where an impressive supercomputer is kept. Unable to resist the temptation, he activates the machine and is unexpectedly transported to a world of high fantasy.

In this new realm, the youth finds himself thrust into chaos, with a mad king on the throne and powerful creatures lurking in the shadows. With few allies and many enemies, he must rely on his intelligence and courage to survive. But he won't be alone: throughout his journey, he will make unexpected friends and discover hidden powers as he faces epic challenges to restore balance to the kingdom.

Will he be able to save this world and find a way back home?
